title: myrsine korthalsii
intro: Myrsine korthalsii, also known as the Chinese boxwood or box myrtle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrsinaceae. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to have medicinal properties that can help reduce pain and fight infections. The health benefits of Myrsine korthalsii include reducing fever, alleviating rheumatic pains, and treating wounds, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, Myrsine korthalsii is often used in tea, decoctions, and infusions, as well as in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to promote overall well-being and health.
